each search should return at least the expected minimum number of results

name: Data-Driven Product Search
description:
As a QA engineer
  I want to run the same search test against multiple data sets from an external file
  So that test data is decoupled from test logic and can be updated without code changes

elements.name: Verify order status is correctly stored in the database

steps.name: the orders table is seeded with sample data
the user queries the order with id 1
the order status should be "CONFIRMED"
the order price should be greater than 0

elements.name: Verify no orders exist with a negative price

steps.name: the orders table is seeded with sample data
the user queries all orders
no order should have a negative price

name: Database Validation Layer
description:
As a QA engineer
  I want to validate backend order data directly at the database level
  So that I can catch data integrity issues that the UI alone might hide
